jobDescription: The Martin Luther University Halle-Wittenberg, Faculty of Natural Sciences III, Institute of Geosciences andGeography, invites applications for the 3-year fixed-term position of aResearch Assistant (m-f-d)to be filled part-time (75 %).Salary will be in accordance with salary class 13 TV-L, pending classification based on individual capacitiesand qualifications.
jobTasks: Development of innovative methods for the characterization and evaluation of groundwater resources
Development of experimental field applications for the observation of groundwater flow and transport processes
Application and further development of methods of numerical simulation and machine learning
Co-supervision of students and independent teaching of courses
